content.feedback: Never use Stop hooks for frequent operations. The Stop event fires after every agent response — a rebuild-index script on Stop caused constant errors in the terminal.
content.how_to_apply: Use PostToolUse with specific matcher (e.g., Write) instead of Stop for KB maintenance. Combine validate + rebuild-index into one hook that only fires when a KB doc is actually written. Reserve Stop hooks for lightweight, silent operations only.
content.why: Stop fires too frequently. Any script that takes time or produces output will spam the terminal and degrade the user experience. The user reported constant errors from rebuild-index.sh running on every response.
